responseText:
`"/1 * * *"` is not valid (cron needs **5 fields**). Use:

- Every 1 minute (and deliver to your Discord DM):  
  `./scripts/schedule.sh add gold_rate_1min "*/1 * * * *" "@assistant Tell me the current gold price in USD and in PKR and tell me if it is a good time to buy gold." "Asia/Karachi" --deliver discord`

Also: you already have `gold_rate_1min` set up to deliver to Discord. Confirm with: `./scripts/schedule.sh list`
